# WAMR Vendor Headers

WebAssembly Micro Runtime headers for IXLandSystem.

## Location

- **Current Location:** `IXLandSystem/vendor/wamr/include/`

These headers are for internal use by the IXLandSystem WAMR runtime only.

## Dependencies

These headers are from the WAMR upstream project and should not be modified.

## Usage

Code outside IXLandSystem should NOT include these headers.
